title: いかれたコンセンサス

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, after spending time scouting some
training grounds the academy owns on an
uninhabited island...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What do you mean the ship home isn't moving?!

text_block_list.name: Sailor
text_block_list.text:
We think it's likely a main system error with the
autopilot function.

text_block_list.name: Captain
text_block_list.text:
All of the other ships are either booked or out for
repairs. It looks like no one will be able to come
for us until late tonight.
choice_data_list: Seems like we'll be here awhile...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Let me see it.

text_block_list.name: Captain
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Hm? This is...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
There's no issue with the main system. It's just a
low battery causing the control system to fail.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, I see. In other words, you're saying a
Chupacabra has been set loose in the South Pole?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I peered into an octopus pot to learn my fortune.
It told me to catch squid for good luck, so I
hitched a boat out here!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But now, after I went through all the trouble to
catch some, you're telling me I gotta wait until
night?! These squids and sea urchins are going to
be devastated if they lose their freshness!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: What do I do, Shakur?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
We just need to charge the battery. If we can find
a way to charge it, then...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As soon as their eyes meet, they both set off
running. I have no idea what's going on, but I
hurry after them.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Yaaaaah!
I've got a lovely bunch of coconuuuts! ♪
choice_data_list: What happened to charging the battery?!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
This'll do. Coconuts have been attracting
attention for their potential use as a biofuel.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Golshi has a ridiculously strong habit of moving
erratically... However, in times like these, it can
be our ticket out of disaster.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: In other words, even Golshi has her uses!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Pheeew...
This is getting old...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: RN-Jackass... Still, everything's going to plan.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Trainer! Hand me that thing we picked up on
the beach earlier!
choice_data_list: You mean the bike with no handlebars?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ohohohoho! What do we have here?! I didn't
know there was such a thing as a two-wheeled
pseudo-unicycle bicycle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
With no handlebars, you've gotta stick your arms
out when you ride it... This thing is da bomb! It
really gives you that feeling you can only get
from riding a unicycle!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Riiight, get on over here! I'm gonna picture myself
on a French mountain road while I ride it!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur skillfully manipulates the
unpredictable Gold Ship and continues her
preparations for charging the ship's battery.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Whiiiir!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
The coconuts are working out surprisingly well. All
I did was cobble together some trash and imitate
a method I've seen before. ...Still, it's working out
all right.

text_block_list.name: Sailor
text_block_list.text: Aye, just a little more!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Bwooon! Chug, chug, chug...

text_block_list.name: Sailor
text_block_list.text: It's running! I've got signal too!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Let's get the hell outta here already. I'm sick to
death of lookin' at the ocean.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Through the combined efforts of Gold Ship and
Air Shakur, we manage to make it safely back to
the academy.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Oh pish posh! All in a day's work for the great
Golshi!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch, don't get too carried away. Any idea how
tough it was for me to stay on top of you?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Excuse you! It was my astounding energy that saved the day, was it not?!
choice_data_list: You two get along surprisingly well.
You two get along surprisingly well.

The important thing is that we made it back
safely!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Excuse you! It was my astounding energy that saved the day, was it not?!
choice_data_list: You two get along surprisingly well.
You two get along surprisingly well.

The important thing is that we made it back
safely!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Hey! Don't tell me her insanity has rubbed off on
you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: How meaaan! Sniff... And here I thought we had a grand friendship even the distant Venusians envy!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Oh, shut up...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship has an eccentricity one might call
genius, which makes the two of them surprisingly
similar... Today, I've seen a new side of Air
Shakur.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Tch... We lost so much time. I need to get this
data compiled right away.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Not so fast, Shakur! We haven't split today's loot
yet! I'm haulin' it over now!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I grabbed you a fir tree fashioned into a New
Year's decoration to get you through the winter
season!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Keep it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur doesn't exactly look pleased, but it's
still been a more or less memorable day!
